title: Parsnip Jalebi Fry
description: A spicy and sweet twist on the classic Indian street food, Jalebi. By substituting the traditional fermented batter with a simple parsnip and spice mixture, we create a crispy and addictive snack.

ingredients.name: Jalebi batter (store-bought)
ingredients.notes: note: use the powdered mix only

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the grated parsnip, lemon juice, ginger paste, garlic paste, red chili powder, garam masala powder, and salt.
Gradually add the store-bought jalebi batter powder to the bowl and mix until the parsnip mixture is well coated.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a slotted spoon, drop small amounts of the parsnip-jalebi mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the jalebi until golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the jalebi from the oil and drain on paper towels.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining parsnip-jalebi mixture.
Serve the parsnip jalebi hot with a dollop of your favorite chutney or a sprinkle of powdered sugar.
Dust the jalebi with rice flour before serving for an extra crispy texture.
Enjoy your crispy and addictive Parsnip Jalebi Fry!
